name: paris_street
_comment: User 2026-05-31 (#17): PP on air. minY/maxY were 0 → engine defaulted to 265-395 (foot 535-665), floating above the cobblestones. walkSegments are at y=510, so clamp PP's top so his foot lands ~720-790: minY=450, maxY=520.
_comment_scale: Retro plan #3 (2026-06-12): PTP reference frames show PP at ~35-40% of screen height; ours rendered ~26%. characterScale 1.15 lifts PP to ~243px and every NPC with him (relative sizes preserved, feet stay planted). Experiment on this scene only - roll out per scene if it reads right.
